title: Oil gains amid renewed tensions in the Middle East
section_path: Oil gains amid renewed tensions in the Middle East
section_path_text: Oil gains amid renewed tensions in the Middle East
summary:
Main
Markets were subdued as they look ahead to the FOMC meeting later this week. This was exacerbated by Chinese markets remaining closed. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-09-18 143408.png | assets/2024-09-18_oil-gains-amid-renewed-tensions-in-the-middle-east_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_d52ea5683794.png

Market Commentary
Crude oil gained as prospects of easing monetary policy were exacerbated by ongoing supply-side issues.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Markets were subdued as they look ahead to the FOMC meeting later this week. This was exacerbated by Chinese markets remaining closed.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Crude oil gained as prospects of easing monetary policy were exacerbated by ongoing supply-side issues. The prospect of oil demand being stimulated by a Fed rate cut helped boost sentiment.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary:
Speculative net long positions in Brent futures hit all-time record low. Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-09-18 143453.png | assets/2024-09-18_oil-gains-amid-renewed-tensions-in-the-middle-east_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_d8633879d593.png
Data source: Commodities Wrap
